# Twenty CRM

Open-source CRM. US-registered (Delaware), 3 years old. Founder Felix Malfait (prior company Kunai, sold to Airbnb; same 8-person engineering core). Active contender in Janus's June 2026 CRM evaluation sprint alongside [[attio]]. Decision expected week of June 16, 2026.

## Product

Fully configurable relational data model with custom objects; API/MCP-first; RBAC for agent scoping; Fuelty Edge for code-declared custom apps. GitHub repo public. Pricing: $10/user/month (legacy tier), margin via AI credits. Self-described "phase 1" (build not sell) — targeting profitability end-2026.

## Notable clients

Bayer (migrating from Salesforce), PwC (via Kunai acquisition).

## Janus evaluation signals (June 10, 2026 demo)

Demo with Felix Malfait, Andrew Soane, Michael Bruck, Jehad Altoutou. Michael: "big fan of open source... more than I was expecting." Jehad code-reviewed the repo: "nicely built, well defined." Andrew ranked it above HubSpot.

Limitations noted: no native Fireflies integration yet (ETA end of June); Microsoft Entra SSO unclear; form builder is DIY.

See [[janus-crm-selection]] for comparative scoring and decision record.
